c-suite_officer: Vinit Pagaria - Head of Data and Research
exact_hq_location: J-1/14, Block - EP and GP, 9th Floor, Sector V, SaltLake City, Kolkata, West Bengal 700071, India
industry_and_segment: FinTech, Information Services (B2C), Financial Software for Indian stock market research and analytics
key_positioning: Empowering Indian stock market traders and investors with self-research and analytics tools across fundamental, technical, and derivatives research, focused on simplifying finance for all.
revenue_model: Freemium model with paid subscriptions for advanced features and premium content.
pricing_tiers: Premium: ₹399/month (₹2999/year) — for active investors wanting curated ideas, combination scans, sector context.
Pro: ₹1499/month (₹11989/year) — for investors wanting full control with complete market intelligence, industry analytics, and chart patterns.
Club: ₹2499/month (₹23989/year) — includes all Pro features plus analyst support, expert recommendations, and live market query resolution.
milestones: Raised first external funding (Pre-Series A from Ramesh Damani) in October 2018.
Received $1.34M in Seed funding from Kotak Securities as part of a total $1.61M raised, as of July 2021.
Launched StockEdge Club (a community for stock market investors).
Reached 2 million app downloads combined on Play Store and App Store.
new_features_launched: Launched AI-powered screening mechanism to automatically identify Chart Patterns (Triangular, Flag, Head and Shoulders, Wedge patterns) — Jan 2023

recent_partnerships_and_integrations.description: Platform integrates directly with NSE for real-time market data.
Platform integrates directly with BSE for real-time market data.
Integration with Zerodha, a renowned trading platform, for seamless transition from research to trading.
Integration with Angel One, a renowned trading platform, for seamless transition from research to trading.

market_sentiment.analyst_view: Analysts generally view StockEdge positively, recognizing its comprehensive research and analytics tools as valuable for both new and experienced investors in the Indian market. They see it as an effective tool for data-driven decision-making.
market_sentiment.user_community_view: User sentiment is predominantly positive, with appreciation for the platform's detailed analysis, ease of use for self-research, and diverse features. However, there are occasional negative reviews regarding customer support, charting limitations, and reported refund issues.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Advanced traders find limited customization options for creating their own indicators compared to more advanced platforms.
effect: May seek alternative platforms or supplement StockEdge with other tools for specific needs.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Users might over-rely on pre-built scans without thoroughly understanding the market context, potentially leading to suboptimal decisions.
effect: Potential for poor trading decisions and financial losses if context is ignored.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Charting features are perceived as basic by some users who prefer more advanced tools like TradingView for in-depth technical analysis.
effect: Users may need to utilize multiple platforms for comprehensive charting capabilities.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Despite simplification efforts, the extensive data and features can present a steep learning curve for new and beginner investors.
effect: Users may require time to master the platform or become discouraged.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: Some users report delays and eventual denials of refund requests, particularly after subscription expiry.
effect: Leads to significant financial loss for the user and negative customer experience.

current_problems_struggling_with.description: A user reported that trading strategies demonstrated during the sales call were not updated daily as promised, leading to perceived financial loss.
effect: Loss of trust in the platform's guidance and potential for trading losses.

user_complaints.issue: Users report being misled about daily strategy updates and refund policies during the subscription sales process.
effect: Financial loss and negative perception of the company's ethical standards.

user_complaints.issue: Complaints about delayed processing and eventual denial of refund requests for subscriptions.
effect: Significant financial impact and severe dissatisfaction with customer service.

user_complaints.issue: Dissatisfaction with customer support, including frustrating interactions and refusal to support via preferred channels like Telegram.
effect: Increased user frustration and a perceived lack of effective support.

user_complaints.issue: Some users find the chart display lacking in clarity and flexibility for their analysis needs.
effect: Hindrance in effective technical analysis, potentially requiring external tools.

user_complaints.issue: A user requested implementing live price updates for stocks to make the application more suitable for real-time trading decisions.
effect: Limits the app's utility for time-sensitive trading strategies.

user_complaints.issue: A user expressed a desire for StockEdge to have physical offices outside of Kolkata.
effect: May lead to a perception of limited regional presence or accessibility for some users.

other_crucial_details: StockEdge has a significant user base with over 5 million app downloads and 500,000 active traders and investors as of April 2026.
The platform aims to empower retail investors by simplifying finance and enabling them to perform their own market research and analytics.
StockEdge provides in-app structured learning content and video tutorials to help users understand financial concepts and effectively use the platform's features.

differentiators.feature: AI-powered screening mechanism to automatically identify various chart patterns (Triangular, Flag, Head & Shoulders, Wedge).
effect: Simplifies complex technical analysis, saves time, and helps in identifying trading opportunities quickly.

differentiators.feature: Offers a comprehensive suite of self-research and analytics tools for fundamental, technical, and derivatives research on Indian markets.
effect: Empowers users to perform in-depth market analysis and make informed investment decisions independently.

differentiators.feature: Provides broker integration with leading Indian platforms like Zerodha and Angel One, streamlining the transition from analysis to trading.
effect: Enhances efficiency and user convenience by allowing direct execution of trades based on research.

differentiators.feature: Focuses on delivering ready-made insights and curated scans, simplifying complex data for a wider audience.
effect: Reduces analysis time and makes market intelligence more accessible and actionable.

strategic_moves.move: Continuously launching new product versions with enhanced features like Chart Patterns, Stock Deliveries, and improved derivatives analytics.
effect: Maintains competitive edge, improves user experience, and attracts new users by offering advanced tools.

strategic_moves.move: Partnered with 'India's Future Investors' reality show to simplify investment learning, expanding reach and promoting financial literacy.
effect: Increases brand visibility and positions StockEdge as a leader in financial education.

strategic_moves.move: Introduced 'Fundamental Score' based on 30+ financial parameters to provide a simplified evaluation of company fundamentals.
effect: Simplifies complex financial analysis, making it quicker and more accessible for investors.

strategic_moves.move: Enhanced Sector Rotation and Market Breadth features with Momentum Scores for more precise trend identification.
effect: Provides users with sharper insights for identifying market trends and strong performing sectors.
